name: Sacred Beasts Thunderclap
effectText: During your Main Phase: You can place 2 "Sacred Beasts Thunderclap" from your hand, Deck, and/or GY, face-up on your field, then you can reveal 1 Level 10 "Sacred Beast" monster in your hand, then place 1 "Fallen Paradise of the Sacred Beasts" from your Deck, face-up in your Field Zone. During your opponent's End Phase, if this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Sacred Beasts Thunderclap" once per turn.
